owner.name: Basavachetan Chanshetty
owner.tagline: Building scalable enterprise solutions at IBM
owner.about: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with 3 years of experience at IBM, specializing in building enterprise-grade applications. I work across the full stack — from crafting responsive Angular UIs to designing robust Node.js and Spring Boot backends. I have deep hands-on experience with webMethods Integration Server, webMethods OneData, and End-to-End Monitoring platforms, along with Elasticsearch, Docker, and AI-powered tools using Watsonx.ai. A Triple Gold Medalist from VTU (Best Academic Outcome 2018–2022, Best Project, and Highest CGPA), I thrive in agile environments and love solving complex integration and monitoring challenges with clean, maintainable code.

projects.title: webMethods End-to-End Monitoring
projects.description: Enterprise observability platform for distributed transaction tracing, real-time alerting, KPI dashboards, and multi-product integration monitoring across webMethods Integration Server, API Gateway, and Trading Networks.
highlights: Distributed transaction tracing across multi-hop integration flows
Rule-based alert engine with Slack & Email notifications
KPI dashboards with time-series analytics in Angular
Elasticsearch-powered trace log analysis at scale

projects.title: webMethods OneData (MDM Platform)
projects.description: Master Data Management platform implementation covering centralized MDM architecture, data governance workflows, quality validation, SAP/ERP integration, and role-based access control for enterprise data domains.
highlights: Centralized MDM architecture with approval workflow routing
Role-based access control with multi-tenant data isolation

projects.title: AI Trace Summarization Tool
projects.description: AI-powered tool that summarizes complex distributed trace JSON data using Large Language Models via IBM Watsonx.ai, reducing debugging time significantly.
highlights: Built Python preprocessing pipeline for trace data
Reduced mean time to resolution by 40%
Designed intuitive summary UI in Angular

responsibilities: Developed scalable backend APIs using Node.js, Express, and Spring Boot
Built responsive and accessible Angular UI components using IBM Carbon Design System
Worked extensively with webMethods Integration Server for enterprise service integration
Implemented and maintained webMethods End-to-End (E2E) Monitoring for transaction tracing
Used webMethods OneData for master data management and data governance workflows
Integrated and optimized Elasticsearch queries for high-volume transaction data
Implemented Slack and Email notification systems for real-time alerting
Collaborated in Agile sprints, code reviews, and technical design discussions
Containerized services using Docker for consistent deployment environments

education.achievement: 🥇 Gold Medalist – Highest CGPA among all B.E. students (2018–2022)

medals.title: Gold Medal – Best Academic Outcome
medals.description: Awarded Gold Medal for Best Academic Outcome across the entire B.E. batch of 2018–2022 at PDA College of Engineering, Kalaburgi under VTU.

medals.title: Gold Medal – Best Project
medals.description: Awarded Gold Medal for Best Final Year Project among all B.E. Engineering students, recognized for outstanding innovation and technical execution.

medals.title: Gold Medal – Highest CGPA
medals.description: Awarded Gold Medal for achieving the Highest CGPA (9.06) among all successful B.E. Engineering students of the 2018–2022 batch at VTU.

education.college: Dr. C B Gurkul Kardyal Bhalki

seo.title: Basavachetan Chanshetty | Full Stack Developer at IBM
seo.description: Portfolio of Basavachetan Chanshetty, a Gold Medalist Full Stack Developer at IBM with 3 years of experience in Angular, Node.js, Spring Boot, webMethods, Elasticsearch, and AI tools.
seo.keywords: Basavachetan Chanshetty, Full Stack Developer, IBM, Angular, Node.js, Spring Boot, Elasticsearch, Watsonx, webMethods, webMethods OneData, webMethods E2E Monitoring, webMethods Integration Server, Bangalore, VTU Gold Medalist
